author: doll-agent
content: numpy.char namespace delivered. src/char.rs binds 22 functions: case ops (lower/upper/capitalize/title/swapcase), strip family (strip/lstrip/rstrip with optional chars), search/query (count/find/startswith/endswith/str_len), modification (replace/add/multiply), and pairwise comparison (equal/not_equal/less/less_equal/greater/greater_equal). Marshalling: numpy str ndarray <-> ferray StringArray<IxDyn> via numpy.asarray — no foreign pyclass; users see numpy.ndarray throughout. 28 new pytest cases all passing (448/448 total). Deferred follow-up: regex/encoding/splitting/alignment/translate ops in ferray-strings.
